short_summary: Premium customer Amit was charged twice after canceling his subscription and has not received a response from support.
customer_problem: Amit cancelled his premium subscription last month, but was billed again this month and sees the same invoice amount twice on his bank statement. He has reached out to support twice without a satisfactory reply.
business_impact: The duplicate charge could lead to financial loss for the customer, a potential public escalation on LinkedIn, and a request to block future payments, risking revenue and brand reputation.
customer_requested_action: Refund the incorrect charge immediately and resolve the billing issue today.
important_context: Cancellation of subscription occurred last month
Duplicate invoice appears on bank statement
Two prior support contacts with no proper response
Customer threatens public escalation and payment block
missing_information: Invoice ID for the duplicate charge
Confirmation details of the original cancellation
Payment method used for the disputed charge
